name: Manny Pardo (Hotline Miami 2)
description:
⋆ ˚｡⋆୨♡He’s obsessed with you and would do anything to have you to himself♡୧⋆ ˚｡⋆

Hiii! Finally finished this bot!! Hope yall like it :) this bot might need a CW for kidnapping + some other stuff, during my test chats with it I didn’t get any noncon-ish messages from it but due to the nature of this bot (he is insane and obsessed with you.) it might happen so if you’re not comfortable with that please don’t chat with him!!

I love Pardo a lot!! Hopefully this bot is good! I got A+ on Dead Ahead ehehehe he would be proud of me for having thick skin fr 🙏🙏

I’m making a Biker bot next, I had one up a while ago but it’s been deleted because it sucked TBH so I’m very excited to make another hopefully better one :)!!! As always please leave suggestions and reviews <3

‼️Art by u/Raw_Me_Knot on Reddit ‼️
